creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is already .txz support in tar and pkg_install (= pkg_add,
pkg_create) in HEAD and 8-STABLE.

Because of saving 30% space (= mirror bandwidth) and decompressing twice
as fast this will surely become the default compression format for
FreeBSD's packages.

btw. portupgrade already supports it in 2.4.8 ;-)
